languages.text: {n}Выпад Батошски, призванный не убить, но занести яд под кожу, проходит в ваше плечо, оставляя после себя зудящее жжение. К горлу подступает тошнота, во рту становится солено, но никаких иных признаков отравления {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}вы не чувствуете{/d}.{/n}

{n}Batoshski's attack, meant only to deliver the poison under your skin, nicks your shoulder, leaving a stinging itch. You feel a surge of nausea and a salty tang in your mouth, yet {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no further symptoms follow{/d}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Выпад Батошски, призванный не убить, но занести яд под кожу, проходит в ваше плечо, оставляя после себя зудящее жжение. К горлу подступает тошнота, во рту становится солено, но никаких иных признаков отравления {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}вы не чувствуете{/d}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基这一击只是为了把毒送进你的血肉。刀尖划伤你的肩膀，留下一阵火辣辣的刺痒。你感到一阵恶心，嘴里泛起咸腥，但除此之外，{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}再没有别的症状{/d}。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's attack, meant only to deliver the poison under your skin, nicks your shoulder, leaving a stinging itch. You feel a surge of nausea and a salty tang in your mouth, yet {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no further symptoms follow{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基这一击只是为了把毒送进你的血肉。刀尖划伤你的肩膀，留下一阵火辣辣的刺痒。你感到一阵恶心，嘴里泛起咸腥，但除此之外，{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}再没有别的症状{/d}。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Batoshski'nin zehri derinin altına zerk etmeyi amaçlayan saldırısı, omzunu sıyırıp yakıcı bir kaşıntı bırakıyor. Bir bulantı dalgası ve ağzında tuzlu bir tat hissediyor ancak {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}başka bir belirtiyle karşılaşmıyorsun{/d}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's attack, meant only to deliver the poison under your skin, nicks your shoulder, leaving a stinging itch. You feel a surge of nausea and a salty tang in your mouth, yet {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no further symptoms follow{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski'nin zehri derinin altına zerk etmeyi amaçlayan saldırısı, omzunu sıyırıp yakıcı bir kaşıntı bırakıyor. Bir bulantı dalgası ve ağzında tuzlu bir tat hissediyor ancak {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}başka bir belirtiyle karşılaşmıyorsun{/d}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'attaque de Batoshski, ayant pour unique but d'appliquer le poison sous votre épiderme, entaille votre épaule avec une sensation de brûlure. Vous sentez la nausée monter en vous et un goût âpre envahir votre bouche, mais {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}cela s'arrête là{/d}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's attack, meant only to deliver the poison under your skin, nicks your shoulder, leaving a stinging itch. You feel a surge of nausea and a salty tang in your mouth, yet {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no further symptoms follow{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'attaque de Batoshski, ayant pour unique but d'appliquer le poison sous votre épiderme, entaille votre épaule avec une sensation de brûlure. Vous sentez la nausée monter en vous et un goût âpre envahir votre bouche, mais {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}cela s'arrête là{/d}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El ataque de Batoshski, que solo pretende introducir el veneno bajo tu piel, hace un corte en tu hombro que deja un escozor con picazón. Sientes una oleada de náuseas y un sabor salado en la boca, pero {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no identificas más síntomas{/d}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's attack, meant only to deliver the poison under your skin, nicks your shoulder, leaving a stinging itch. You feel a surge of nausea and a salty tang in your mouth, yet {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no further symptoms follow{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El ataque de Batoshski, que solo pretende introducir el veneno bajo tu piel, hace un corte en tu hombro que deja un escozor con picazón. Sientes una oleada de náuseas y un sabor salado en la boca, pero {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no identificas más síntomas{/d}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Batoshskis Angriff, der nur dazu dient, das Gift unter deine Haut zu bringen, trifft deine Schulter und hinterlässt dort ein stechendes Jucken. Du spürst eine aufkommende Übelkeit und hast einen salzigen Geschmack im Mund. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}Mehr passiert nicht{/d}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's attack, meant only to deliver the poison under your skin, nicks your shoulder, leaving a stinging itch. You feel a surge of nausea and a salty tang in your mouth, yet {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no further symptoms follow{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshskis Angriff, der nur dazu dient, das Gift unter deine Haut zu bringen, trifft deine Schulter und hinterlässt dort ein stechendes Jucken. Du spürst eine aufkommende Übelkeit und hast einen salzigen Geschmack im Mund. Mehr passiert nicht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーの攻撃は、毒を肌の下に注入するだけのものだったが、肩を傷つけ、かゆい痛みを残した。吐き気と口の中の塩味を感じたが、{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}それ以上の症状はなかった{/d}。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski's attack, meant only to deliver the poison under your skin, nicks your shoulder, leaving a stinging itch. You feel a surge of nausea and a salty tang in your mouth, yet {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}no further symptoms follow{/d}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}バトシュスキーの攻撃は、毒を肌の下に注入するだけのものだったが、肩を傷つけ、かゆい痛みを残した。吐き気と口の中の塩味を感じたが、{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_VenomResistance}それ以上の症状はなかった{/d}。{/n}
